core_objective.text: BUILD LSTM+OPTUNA VAULT-EQUITY RESEARCH PIPELINE per PIPELINE_SPEC_lstm_optuna_vault_trader.md v0.4: atomized PIT bars (atoms/bars_bt/CSV fallback), RSI/MACD/Bollinger/ATR signals with strict anti-leakage, LSTM with partial forgetting and residual skip, purged expanding-window K-fold with embargo, Optuna hyperparameter search on train-only inner val, OOS-only trading loop with costs, simulated portfolio, and verified PNL JSON+MD+model_card. Default HERMES_RESEARCH_SMOKE=1 for orchestrator runs. Research only — no live trading.

master_plan.title: Data loader + config + requirements + sample CSV
master_plan.intent: Under generated/lstm_optuna_vault_trader/: create config.py with HERMES_RESEARCH_SMOKE defaults (LIMIT_BARS=2000, N_SPLITS=2, OPTUNA_TRIALS=3, EPOCHS=5, LOOKBACK=30, MIN_TRAIN_BARS=120, TEST_BARS=40 when smoke=1). Create requirements.txt (pandas, numpy, torch, optuna, scikit-learn, pytest). Create data_loader.py: load_bars(symbol, interval) preferring alpha_atoms.atoms_5min_mkt then market_5min.equity_bars_bt then CSV sample_data/aapl_5min_sample.csv; derive bar_end_utc from ts_utc+5min if missing; asyncpg optional with 5s timeout; document FILE OF DATA vault cleaning lineage in docstring. Copy sample CSV with at least 500 rows.

master_plan.title: Technical signals + leakage guards
master_plan.intent: Create signals.py: RSI(14), MACD line/signal/hist, bb_pct_b (clip, div-by-zero safe), atr_norm, return_lag1/5, rolling_vol, session_progress — all shifted 1 bar. build_feature_frame(df), assert_no_leakage(), FEATURE_COLS export. Import config.LOOKBACK for min row guard. No future data in features.

master_plan.title: Sequence dataset + fold scaler
master_plan.intent: Create dataset.py: build_sequences(lookback=config.LOOKBACK) returning X,y_reg,y_cls,ts with alignment rule (features rows i-lookback+1..i predict label at i). FoldScaler fit on train fold only. Enforce minimum row count LOOKBACK+26+20.

master_plan.title: LSTM model + partial forgetting + node skip
master_plan.intent: Create partial_forgetting.py (PartialForgettingGate, fold_reset hidden zeroing) and nn_model.py: 1-2 layer LSTM batch_first, dropout, residual skip from last timestep, linear head for next_return regression. train_fold() with AdamW, grad clip 1.0, early stop, seed 42, CPU-safe. models/.gitkeep.

master_plan.title: Purged expanding-window K-fold splits
master_plan.intent: Create purged_kfold.py: expanding-window chronological splits with purge+embargo (embargo_bars=12). Use config.N_SPLITS, MIN_TRAIN_BARS, TEST_BARS. assert_purge_valid(train_idx, test_idx, timestamps). Export fold index tuples for optuna and backtest.

master_plan.title: Optuna hyperparameter tuner
master_plan.intent: Create optuna_tuner.py: Optuna study on inner 85/15 train/val split within outer train fold only; OPTUNA_TRIALS from config; InMemoryStorage when smoke; save best_params_fold_k.json. Fallback to 3 hand-picked param sets if optuna import fails. Never use outer test fold during search.

master_plan.title: Trading loop + portfolio simulator
master_plan.intent: Create trading_loop.py: map OOS regression predictions to positions {-1,0,1} with deadband and 1bp slippage+0.5bp spread costs. Create portfolio.py: simulate NAV from strategy returns, track turnover and drawdown. OOS fold predictions only.

master_plan.title: Backtest + PnL reports + run_pipeline CLI
master_plan.intent: Create backtest_pnl.py (OOS-only run_backtest, adaptive params when sample short), run_pipeline.py CLI entry. Write reports/pnl_report.json, pnl_report.md, model_card.md documenting leakage controls and LSTM architecture. Generate split_manifest.json and optuna_summary.json on run.

master_plan.title: pytest verification suite
master_plan.intent: Create tests/test_lstm_pipeline.py ONLY (no shell scripts, no _run_* files): test load_bars sample, assert_no_leakage, purged split ordering, LSTM one-fold 2-epoch CPU smoke, run_backtest finite_pnl and oos_bars>0. Must finish in under 120s smoke. Forbidden: .sh/.bat helpers in tests/.
